name: bhatkar-fragrance-hub-backend
description: Backend API for Bhatkar Fragrance Hub - MySQL + Express.js

scripts.db:setup: mysql -u root -p < database/schema.sql && mysql -u root -p < database/seed.sql
scripts.db:reset: mysql -u root -p -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS bhatkar_fragrance; CREATE DATABASE bhatkar_fragrance;" && npm run db:setup
